meta.title: Santiago Ramírez · Custom Apps, Coaching & Digital Strategy
meta.description: I turn manual businesses into digital platforms. Certified Professional Coach & Marketing degree. Working demo in 48hrs. App ready in 15 days.
meta.ogTitle: Your business loses clients every day without a system
meta.ogDescription: Apps, marketplaces, e-commerce and custom systems. Free demo before paying. Delivery in 15 days.

hero.subtitle: I turn manual businesses into {highlight} In 15 days, with a working demo before you pay.
hero.subtitleHighlight: digital platforms that generate clients, automate processes and give you back your time.

pain.label: Sound familiar?
pain.title: These problems are costing you money

items.title: Losing clients because they can't find you?
items.desc: Without a digital presence, your clients go to competitors who show up on Google.

items.title: Managing everything through WhatsApp and spreadsheets?
items.desc: Mistakes, forgotten tasks, lost data. Your business grows, but your workflow doesn't.

items.title: No time for everything?
items.desc: Answering inquiries, making quotes, following up with clients... all manual, all slow.

items.title: Already invested in something that didn't work?
items.desc: You paid for a website or system that didn't deliver results. No support. No ROI.

differentiator.label: Unique advantage
differentiator.title: Try your app before paying a single dollar
differentiator.subtitle: I don't ask you to trust blindly. Within 48 hours I'll send you a working, personalized demo you can try on your phone. If you're not convinced, you don't pay.

features.title: Your brand
features.desc: Your logo, your colors, your identity. Not a generic template.

features.title: On your phone
features.desc: Open the link and try it. Works like a real app from the browser.

features.title: Your logic
features.desc: We simulate your real business flow. You see how it actually works.

features.title: No commitment
features.desc: If you don't like it or it's not what you expected, there's no cost. Simple as that.

differentiator.proof: 90% of my clients approve the project after seeing the demo.

items.name: Martín L.
items.text: He built our management system in 2 weeks. We use it every day and nothing gets lost anymore.

items.name: Claudia R.
items.text: The platform turned out exactly as we asked. Met deadlines and was always available for adjustments.

items.name: Roberto S.
items.text: We used to make quotes in 30 minutes, now in 2. The e-commerce changed how we work.

projects.label: Real cases
projects.title: Not mockups. Real businesses running.
projects.subtitle: Each project solved a real problem and generated measurable results.
projects.cta: I want results like these for my business →
projects.disclaimer: Due to confidentiality agreements, we do not disclose commercial names, domains or identifying data of our clients. All results are real and verifiable.

process.label: Simple process
process.title: From idea to app in 15 days
process.subtitle: No surprises. Fixed price from day one. No fine print.

steps.title: We talk
steps.desc: Tell me about your business and what problem you want to solve. No commitment, no fine print.

steps.title: Your demo in 48hrs
steps.desc: I send you a real demo with your logo, colors and business logic. You see it on your phone.

steps.title: Development
steps.desc: Visible progress every 2-3 days. No black boxes. You see your project grow in real time.

steps.title: Delivery + Support
steps.desc: Your app in production, documented, with 30 days of included support for adjustments.

automation.label: Your business on autopilot
automation.title: Stop doing everything yourself
automation.subtitle: Your platform works for you: responds, manages, sells and notifies. Without touching a button.

features.title: Auto responses
features.desc: Your app answers inquiries while you sleep. Your clients get instant responses.

features.title: Client management
features.desc: History, tracking, statuses. All in a panel that replaces your 15 spreadsheets.

features.title: Smart notifications
features.desc: Automatic WhatsApp, email or push. Your clients never forget about you.

features.title: Sales without intervention
features.desc: Catalog, cart, payments. Your business generates revenue even when you're not there.

automation.cta: I want to automate my business →

services.label: Solutions
services.title: Choose what your business needs
services.subtitle: Each service is designed to generate results, not just deliver code.

items.name: PWA Mobile App
items.desc: Your business on your clients' phones. Custom design, push notifications, offline support. No app stores needed.

items.name: Marketplace
items.desc: Connect supply with demand. Verified profiles, advanced search, reviews, integrated payments and admin panel.

items.name: E-commerce + Admin
items.desc: Sell online with catalog, cart, checkout, payments and a full panel to manage products, orders and clients.

items.name: Sales Landing
items.desc: High-impact page optimized for conversion. SEO, copywriting, WhatsApp integration and analytics.

items.name: Custom System
items.desc: Appointments, inventory, CRM, billing, process automation — I digitize what's holding you back.

services.help: Not sure which one you need?
services.helpLink: Let's talk — I'll advise you for free

finalCta.subtitle: The call takes 30 minutes, it's free, and the next day you'll have a demo with your brand working on your phone.
finalCta.location: Villa María, Córdoba · Working with Argentina and abroad

footer.copy: © 2026 Santiago Ramírez · App development, coaching & digital strategy

coaching.label: Coaching & Mentoring
coaching.title: I don't just build the tool. I help you use it to grow.
coaching.subtitle: Certified in Professional Coaching & Personal Development (180 hrs) with a degree in Marketing & Digital Marketing. I combine technology, strategy and mentoring so your business actually scales — not just in code, but in results.

forWho.title: Who is this for?
items: Business owners who want to scale but don't know where to start
Entrepreneurs who need a clear, actionable digital strategy
Professionals who want to organize their business and stop firefighting
People who already have an app or website but aren't getting results from it

starter.name: Strategy Session
starter.desc: A deep 90-minute session to unblock your current situation and walk away with a concrete action plan.
features: Full diagnosis of your business or project

pro.name: Monthly Mentoring
pro.desc: Ongoing support to transform your business. Strategy + execution + accountability.
features: 4 monthly sessions of 60 min (1 per week)
Priority if you need technical development

vip.name: VIP Integral
vip.desc: Coaching + strategy + technical implementation. Your complete external team in one person.
features: Everything in the Monthly Mentoring plan
Technical implementation included (landing pages, tweaks, automations)

coaching.note: All plans can be cancelled at any time. First session with guarantee: if it wasn't useful, 100% refund.
